impact: Advances the PP&D plan by adding another source-grounded permit workflow model without live crawling, private DevHub data, or consequential automation.
summary: Adds a narrow fixture-only demolition permit process skeleton and deterministic validation for public-only evidence, stages, facts, documents, file rules, fee/finalization gates, and citation-backed action gates.
target_task: Task checkbox-87: Add a fixture-only permit-process skeleton for a demolition permit workflow using existing public fixture/source-inventory evidence only, with stages, required facts, required documents, file rules, fee/payment gates, inspection or finalization gates, and citation-backed action gates.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
